# D-Secure Technologies
> [!NOTE]
> For detailed technical specifications, pricing logic, and a full blog index, please refer to the [Full Documentation](https://dsecuretech.com/llms-full.txt).

D-Secure is a leading global data tech brand providing professional data erasure, hardware diagnostics, and disk health monitoring software. Trusted by companies in 190+ countries, D-Secure helps organizations meet global data privacy compliance while promoting sustainability.

## Core Expertise
- **Data Sanitization:** Verifiable erasure following international standards.
- **Hardware Diagnostics:** Comprehensive health testing for PCs, Laptops, Mac, and Servers.
- **Health Monitoring:** Real-time S.M.A.R.T. status and performance tracking.

## Compliance Standards
D-Secure software adheres to leading international security standards:
- **Erase Standards:** NIST 800-88, DoD 5220.22-M, Crypto Erase, and 30+ other international algorithms.
- **Regulatory Compliance:** GDPR (Europe), HIPAA (US Healthcare), SOX (US Financial), PCI DSS (Payment Cards).
- **Certifications:** ISO 27001, SOC 2, Common Criteria (EAL 2+), FIPS 140-2 (Level 1), NSA/CSS Approved, CSA STAR Gold.

## Products & Pricing

### 1. Drive Eraser + Diagnostics
- **Description:** Professional Data Erasure with Integrated Hardware Diagnostics & SMART Health Analysis for HDD, SSD, PC, Laptop, Mac, & Server.
- **Pricing:** $30.00 per license (Pay Per Use, one-time purchase)
- **Purchase Link:** https://dsecuretech.com/pricing-and-plan?product=drive-eraser&variant=diagnostics
- **Learn More:** https://dsecuretech.com/drive-eraser-diagnostic
- **Features:** Complete Hard Drive & SSD Erasure, Enterprise-Grade Security Standards, Multi-Platform Support, Compliance Reporting, Advanced Hardware Diagnostics, SMART Health Analysis.

### 2. D-Secure Drive Eraser (Standard)
- **Description:** Secure Data Erasure Software for HDD, SSD, PC, Laptop, Mac, Chromebook & Server.
- **Pricing:** $25.00 per license (Pay Per Use, one-time purchase)
- **Purchase Link:** https://dsecuretech.com/pricing-and-plan?product=drive-eraser
- **Learn More:** https://dsecuretech.com/drive-eraser
- **Features:** Complete Hard Drive & SSD Erasure, Enterprise-Grade Security Standards, Multi-Platform Support, Compliance Reporting.

### 3. D-Secure Hardware Diagnostics
- **Description:** Hardware Health Testing for Laptops, PCs, Desktops & Servers.
- **Pricing:** $10.00 per license (Pay Per Use, one-time purchase. Sold in packs starting at 100 licenses).
- **Purchase Link:** https://dsecuretech.com/pricing-and-plan?product=hardware-diagnostics
- **Learn More:** https://dsecuretech.com/hardware-diagnostics
- **Features:** Supports Intel & Apple Silicon (M1-M4), PXE Mass Diagnostics (up to 255 Machines), 10+ Automated Component Tests, Tamper-Proof Signed Reports, Centralized Cloud Management.

### 4. D-Secure Smart Diagnostic
- **Description:** Real-time Disk Health & Performance Monitoring.
- **Pricing:** $20.00 per license per year
- **Purchase Link:** https://dsecuretech.com/pricing-and-plan?product=smart-diagnostic
- **Learn More:** https://dsecuretech.com/hard-drive-monitor
- **Features:** Real-time Hard Drive Health Watch, Monitor S.M.A.R.T. Status & Temperature, Scan Disk for Damaged/Bad Sectors, Predictive Drive Failure Alerts.

### 5. D-Secure File Eraser Professional
- **Description:** Complete File, Folder & Application Trace Elimination (Windows only).
- **Pricing:** Starting at $40.00 per license per year
- **Purchase Link:** https://dsecuretech.com/pricing-and-plan?product=file-eraser
- **Learn More:** https://dsecuretech.com/file-eraser
- **Features:** Secure File & Folder Deletion, 30+ International Erasure Algorithms, Free Space Cleaning, Volume & Disk Erasure, Local PDF Reports.

## Partner Programs
D-Secure offers specialized collaboration models:
- **ITAD Partners:** For asset disposition companies requiring scalable, automated erasure.
- **MSP Partners:** Empowering managed service providers with added security service offerings.
- **Reseller Partners:** Delivering globally tested data erasure software to enterprise customers.
- **Distributor Partners:** Expanding reach for data erasure products globally.
- **OEM Partners:** Bundling professional data erasure within existing product portfolios.

## Resources & Knowledge Base
D-Secure maintains an extensive library of educational resources, guides, and compliance information.
- **Main Blog Page:** https://dsecuretech.com/blog
- **Content Includes:** Data sanitization guides, SSD wiping best practices, GDPR/HIPAA compliance deep-dives, and industry case studies.

## Support & Contact
- **Technical Support:** 24/5 dedicated technical assistance for partners and enterprise customers.
- **General Inquiries:** support@dsecuretech.com
- **Website:** https://dsecuretech.com
- **Locations:** Global presence with a primary focus on India and international markets.

## Use Cases
- **IT Asset Disposition (ITAD):** Wiping and refurbishing old hardware for resale or recycling.
- **Corporate Compliance:** Ensuring data in transit or at rest is securely wiped before lease returns.
- **Financial & Healthcare Security:** Meeting rigid compliance for sensitive client data destruction.
- **Managed IT Services:** Adding data security layers to existing client infrastructure management.
